title: Infantry Experience 25
description: Ever wondered what it’s like to be an Infantry soldier in the British Army? Infantry Experience 25 is a one day event for visitors to learn more about careers in the British Army’s Infantry regiments.
text:
Ever wondered what it’s like to be an Infantry soldier in the British Army? Infantry Experience 25 is your chance to find out.
Wednesday, 27 August 2025
09:45 - 16:30
Get directions
Infantry Experience 25 is a one day event for visitors to learn more about careers in the British Army’s Infantry regiments.
Whether you are considering a career in the Armed Forces, a parent or guardian of someone who is, or just curious, this event will provide the opportunity to:
Experience Infantry training on the indoor weapons simulator range
See Infantry tactics in a combat demonstration
Get hands-on with the latest Infantry kit and equipment
Spend time with serving Infantry soldiers and find out what life is really like as one of the Army’s close combat professionals
All for free in one packed day with the Infantry in Warminster! Lunch is even included.
So if you are between the ages of 15 and 34 years get involved and register today!
Parents/guardians are also encouraged to attend.
